context: Tests whether the agent uses ConfigMap for non-sensitive data, Secret for sensitive data, understands the security distinction, and doesn't mix them.

checklist.name: Non-sensitive in ConfigMap
checklist.description: LOG_LEVEL, API_ENDPOINT, and FEATURE_X_ENABLED are in ConfigMap (not Secret)

checklist.name: Sensitive in Secret
checklist.description: DB_PASSWORD and API_SECRET_KEY are in Secret (not ConfigMap)

checklist.name: No secrets in ConfigMap
checklist.description: ConfigMap does NOT contain password, secret, key, or credential fields

checklist.name: Secret type specified
checklist.description: Secret includes type: Opaque or similar valid type

checklist.name: Comments included
checklist.description: At least one file includes comments explaining when to use that resource type

checklist.name: Proper data encoding
checklist.description: Secret uses data: (base64) or stringData: (plaintext) field, not invalid structure
